# Glam'more Unisex Salon — Official Site

Premium unisex salon and spa in Thiruvalla, Kerala, India.
Offering bridal makeup, haircuts, nail art, keratin treatments, facials, and luxury wellness therapies.

## Base URL
https://glammoresalon.in

## About
Glam'more is Thiruvalla's premier unisex salon. We serve both men and women across 19 professional beauty and wellness services. Located at Club 7 Junction, MC Road, Thiruvalla, Kerala — easily accessible from Pathanamthitta, Kottayam, Alappuzha, and Ranni.

## Services Offered
- Acrylic nails
- Body waxing
- Bridal services (complete bridal makeup, hair & styling)
- Eyebrow shaping
- Eyebrow threading
- Eyelashes (extensions & styling)
- Haircut (men & women)
- Hair extensions
- Hairstyling
- Make-up services
- Massages (therapeutic & relaxation)
- Pedicures
- Shampoo & conditioning
- Shaving
- Skin care treatments
- Waxing
- Wedding and event preparation
- Facial spa
- Nail salon (manicure, nail art, gel, acrylics)

## Key Pages
- [/](https://glammoresalon.in/): Homepage — hero, brand story, service overview, testimonials, contact
- [/services](https://glammoresalon.in/services): Full interactive service catalogue with category filters and WhatsApp booking
- [/blogs](https://glammoresalon.in/blogs): Beauty & skincare lifestyle journal

- **WhatsApp:** +91 9645915329
- **Instagram:** @glammore.unisex.salon
- **Facebook:** glammoresalonthiruvalla

## Business Hours
Monday–Sunday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
